experiences.title: Cybersecurity & AI Engineer Intern
achievements: Designed and implemented PrompTrend — a continuous vulnerability discovery and risk scoring system for Large Language Models (LLMs).
Performed adversarial testing and security evaluation of black-box LLM APIs to detect jailbreaks, prompt injections, and model misuse.

Published research paper “PrompTrend: Continuous Community-Driven Vulnerability Discovery and Assessment for Large Language Models” (arXiv 2025), adopted by security researchers for ongoing AI model risk assessment.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
achievements: Conducted penetration testing on a cloud-hosted web application, verified data integrity, and strengthened application security controls.
Deployed the application securely to the cloud and integrated a machine-learning model for email generation using TensorFlow.
Contributed to secure backend architecture and CI/CD practices.

experiences.title: Freelancer
achievements: Designed and deployed secure web applications for document classification using Python, Scikit-Learn, and React — reducing manual sorting time by 50%.
Integrated machine learning models safely into production React environments with API hardening and secure data handling.

achievements: Supported system design improvements and performed data analysis and simulations to optimize HVAC systems.
